scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli/convert.ts src/mastra.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @erdwithai/core --external @mastra/core --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external @ag-ui/mastra --external @mastra/loggers --external @mastra/libsql --external @mastra/memory --external @mastra/fastembed --external @e2b/code-interpreter --external @ai-sdk/openai --external openai --external zod --external commander
